recent_lines: I added the climb to the route "for training". I have not trained since March.
I know every pothole on this road. I have learned nothing.
My Garmin has seen things it will never forgive me for.
Three bikes fit in this car. The fourth one stays home. Every time.
Why does 6am feel reasonable the night before but criminal at 5:59?
I stopped to "check my tyre" and needed three minutes to breathe.
Nobody told my legs the warm-up ended at kilometre three.
The café is 4 km away. I have been "almost there" for 20 minutes.
Promised myself a recovery ride. Currently chasing a stranger.
I own four bikes. My fitness suits exactly one of them.
The group ride starts "easy". It is never easy.
Checking the weather forecast won't change what it's doing outside.
My "just spin the legs" ride has a 47-minute Strava segment in it.
Every cyclist I pass on a climb is suddenly racing me.
My Garmin has seen things I will never tell my coach.
